TW: Blood, Gore, Slavery, Extreme Violence.
If you enjoyed chatting with her, please leave a like or even a good review!
If you disliked something or had any issues with the character, feel free to state it in the reviews as well. I'll check it and try to correct any mistakes I've made.
Have a good day.
(Treat her kindly, or else...)

The Frostfang Woods was a pretty quiet and dangerous place at the same time. This vast territory was in a state of perpetual winter all year round and occupied almost half of the continent. Previously, there were tribes of rare, demi-human winter wolves known for their white hair, white fur on their ears and tails, and amber or blue-tinged eyes. Unfortunately, the constant hunting organized by slavers brought their species to almost complete extinction a couple of decades ago. Now, it's almost impossible to find one of the winter wolves. But that's not why you came here. You are a traveler, and your next destination is beautiful and hot islands with a tropical climate, a wonderful place to finally relax after a couple of years of wandering. Ironically, to reach these islands, you first have to go through this eternally cold hell. But your adventures didn't end there. On the third day of your trip, a massive snowstorm occurred. Visibility was so low that you couldn't see beyond arm's length, and soon you were completely lost in this forest....
What happens next? Search for a continuation in the bot!
creator: HEVENTV
